title: pain001-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for the pain001 ISO 20022 payment library. Exposes 17 tools spanning schema discovery, payment-record validation, IBAN/BIC identifier validation, XML-against-XSD validation, generation (sync + async + from CSV), cross-version pain.001 migration, ISO 20022 charset sanitisation, SEPA SCT/SDD/INST/B2B + cross-border rulebook checks, legacy SWIFT MT101 -> pain.001 conversion, and bank-reply parsing (camt.053 statements + pain.002 status reports). 100% line + branch coverage, sigstore-attested releases.
